motd.description:
Join us as we send Rocket Arena off with a blast in a special pvp playlist this week!
Playlist active:
Wednesday, March 20, 2024 10:00 AM - Thursday, March 21, 2024 12:00 PM PDT
Dev+Community Play Session:
Wednesday, March 20 3:00 PM - 5:00 PM PDT
motd.title: Final Sendoff Playlist

motd.description:
Rocket Arena will be sunset on March 21, 2024 12:00 PM PDT. We’ll have some community events leading up to the date.

Read more at rocketarena.com and finalstrike.games.
motd.title: Rocket Arena Sunset Announcement

motd.description:
Looking for faster Matches?

Enable Cross-Play in the Game settings menu to speed up matchmaking.
motd.title: Cross-Play
